import { useNavigate, Link } from "react-router-dom"; import AdminSidebar from "../components/layout/AdminSidebar"; import DashboardLayout from "../components/layout/DashboardLayout"; const AdminDashboard = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); return ( }>
